title: centemopsis graminea
intro: Centemopsis graminea, also known as the grass-leaved centemopsis, is a plant species in the family Scrophulariaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in African herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in the management of gastrointestinal problems. Centemopsis graminea is often prepared as a tea or infusion for its herbal remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
